# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV = "PLUGIN_MODULES";
const DEFAULT_MODE_ENV = "PLUGIN_MODE";
const DEFAULT_ALLOW_REMOTE_ENV = "PLUGIN_ALLOW_REMOTE";
const DEFAULT_BASE_URL_ENV = "PLUGIN_BASE_URL";

type ModuleSpecInput = string | string[] | null | undefined;

interface LoadOptions {
  allowRemote: boolean;
  baseUrl?: string;
}

interface LoadedModule {
  specifier: string;
  module: unknown;
  error?: string;
}

function parseList(input: ModuleSpecInput): string[] {
  if (!input) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(input)) return input.flatMap(parseList).filter(Boolean);
  return input
    .split(",")
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function isRemoteSpecifier(specifier: string): boolean {
  return /^https?:\/\//i.test(specifier);
}

function resolveSpecifier(specifier: string, baseUrl?: string): string {
  if (isRemoteSpecifier(specifier)) return specifier;
  if (specifier.startsWith("./") || specifier.startsWith("../") || specifier.startsWith("/")) {
    if (!baseUrl) return specifier;
    try {
      return new URL(specifier, baseUrl).toString();
    } catch {
      return specifier;
    }
  }
  return specifier;
}

function normalizeModuleList(query: URLSearchParams, env: Record<string, string | undefined>): string[] {
  const queryModules = parseList(query.get("module") ?? query.get("modules"));
  const envModules = parseList(env[DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV]);
  const combined = [...queryModules, ...envModules];
  return Array.from(new Set(combined));
}

function getLoadOptions(env: Record<string, string | undefined>): LoadOptions {
  const allowRemote = (env[DEFAULT_ALLOW_REMOTE_ENV] ?? "true").toLowerCase() !== "false";
  const baseUrl = env[DEFAULT_BASE_URL_ENV];
  return { allowRemote, baseUrl };
}

async function safeImport(specifier: string, options: LoadOptions): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  const resolved = resolveSpecifier(specifier, options.baseUrl);

  if (isRemoteSpecifier(resolved) && !options.allowRemote) {
    return { specifier: resolved, module: null, error: "Remote imports are disabled" };
  }

  try {
    const module = await import(resolved);
    return { specifier: resolved, module };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      specifier: resolved,
      module: null,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  }
}

async function loadModules(specifiers: string[], options: LoadOptions): Promise<LoadedModule[]> {
  const results: LoadedModule[] = [];
  for (const specifier of specifiers) {
    results.push(await safeImport(specifier, options));
  }
  return results;
}

function serializeModuleExports(module: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (!module || typeof module !== "object") return {};
  const output: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(module as Record<string, unknown>)) {
    if (typeof value === "function") {
      output[key] = "[Function]";
    } else if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
      output[key] = Array.isArray(value) ? "[Array]" : "[Object]";
    } else {
      output[key] = value;
    }
  }
  return output;
}

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...(init.headers ?? {}),
    },
  });
}

Deno.serve(async (req: Request) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const env = Deno.env.toObject();
  const options = getLoadOptions(env);
  const modules = normalizeModuleList(url.searchParams, env);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response("ok", { status: 200 });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/load") {
    if (modules.length === 0) {
      return jsonResponse({
        ok: false,
        message: "No modules specified. Provide ?module=... or set PLUGIN_MODULES.",
      }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const loaded = await loadModules(modules, options);
    return jsonResponse({
      ok: true,
      modules: loaded.map((entry) => ({
        specifier: entry.specifier,
        ok: !entry.error,
        error: entry.error ?? null,
        exports: entry.error ? null : serializeModuleExports(entry.module),
      })),
    });
  }

  const mode = (env[DEFAULT_MODE_ENV] ?? "info").toLowerCase();

  if (mode === "load") {
    const loaded = await loadModules(modules, options);
    return jsonResponse({
      ok: true,
      loadedCount: loaded.filter((m) => !m.error).length,
      modules: loaded.map((entry) => ({
        specifier: entry.specifier,
        ok: !entry.error,
        error: entry.error ?? null,
      })),
    });
  }

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    message: "Deno Deploy plugin loader",
    usage: {
      queryParameters: [
        "?module=./plugins/foo.ts",
        "?modules=./plugins/foo.ts,https://example.com/plugin.ts",
      ],
      environmentVariables: {
        [DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV]: "./plugins/foo.ts,https://example.com/plugin.ts",
        [DEFAULT_ALLOW_REMOTE_ENV]: "true",
        [DEFAULT_BASE_URL_ENV]: "https://example.com/",
      },
    },
    configuredModules: modules,
  });
});
